code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      mut c = b
      if b >= 65 and b <= 90
        c = b + 32
      else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
        c = b - 32
      end
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
    when None
      result = result
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print(result)
when None
  print("")
end
